channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: WHO warns of health risks from ‘black rain’ in Iran
item.description: The World Health Organization warned that “black rain” caused by strikes on Iran’s oil facilities pose health risks.

item.title: Global airlines hike ticket prices as Iran war sends costs soaring
item.description: The war has sent oil prices surging, upending global travel and pushing airline ticket costs on some routes sky-high.

item.title: ‘Our hearts were shaking’: Tehran residents endure heavy Israel-US bombing
item.description: The latest attacks come a day after bombing of fuel reserves created thick plumes of smoke that turned day into night.

item.title: IEA due to meet as member states mull releasing oil reserves amid Iran war
item.description: International Energy Agency chief says talks aim to assess conditions as US-Israel war on Iran fuels global uncertainty.

item.title: US general says he ‘respects’ Iran’s fight
item.description: The chairman of the US Joint Chiefs of Staff said he “respects” Iran’s resistance in the war.

item.title: Israeli air strike targets building in south Lebanon
item.description: An Israeli air strike has heavily damaged a building in southern Lebanon’s Tyre district.

item.title: Pete Hegseth vows ‘most intense day’ of US strikes against Iran
item.description: Pete Hegseth says Donald Trump controls the pace of the war, but acknowledges that Israel has its own objectives.

item.title: Protesters block Iran’s women’s football team bus en route to airport
item.description: Protesters blocked a bus carrying Iran’s women’s football team in Australia after 5 players slipped away to seek asylum.

item.title: US defence chief ends Iran war briefing with prayer for troops
item.description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth recited a prayer for US troops attacking Iran, asking for strength and protection.

item.title: What is the Hezbollah-linked financial institution Al-Qard Al-Hassan?
item.description: Israel reportedly struck a branch of Al-Qard Al-Hassan yesterday. But what is this institution linked to Hezbollah?
